falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any daily session
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break of the August 2024 equivalent low (~4973) with follow-through invalidates the bottom pattern match; the 79% similarity to bottom_2024_aug requires holding above the structural low, not breaking it decisively

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom featured VIX peak near 28; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic escalation beyond the referenced pattern, proving this is not a comparable bottom formation but rather a breakdown into deeper correction

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further below -50bps (more negative)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern coincided with spread normalization toward -10bps; renewed steepening inversion signals recession acceleration, invalidating the cyclical recovery thesis embedded in the 79% pattern match

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
